title: Zwei tolle Käfer räumen auf
overview: El Guancho, a clever inventor and adventurer, leads a peaceful life on the island of Lanzarote. But one day, he finds himself caught between two rival treasure hunting gangs. With the help of his supercar Dudu and the robot crab Picho, which he developed himself, El Guancho takes on the crooks.
